code:
import io
import string
import list

fn tokenize(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in xs
    if not inserted and x < y
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn add_unique_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ ys: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = xs
  for y in ys
    if not list.contains(result, y)
      result = insert_sorted(result, y)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_one_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one_line()
let line2 = read_one_line()
let a = tokenize(line1)
let b = tokenize(line2)
let unioned = add_unique_sorted(add_unique_sorted([], a), b)

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in unioned
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
